title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.


### OS

_No response_

title: OpenAI Node: Analyze Image only shows GPT-4o models, excludes newer vision-capable models
summary:
### Bug Description

The Analyze Image operation's model dropdown only shows models containing `vision` or `gpt-4o` in their ID. This is because `imageModelSearch` in `listSearch.ts` uses a stale whitelist filter:

```typescript
(model) => model.id.includes('vision') || model.id.includes('gpt-4o')
`

title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

### Rele

title: [PR] 🛡️ Sentinel: [CRITICAL/HIGH] Fix XSS vulnerability in highlight matches
summary:
**Severity:** HIGH
**Vulnerability:** Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability was present due to unescaped string outputs injected into an `[innerHTML]` binding for search highlighting. This bypassed Angular's built-in XSS protection mechanism.
**Impact:** Attackers could execute malicious scripts
